title: Kushiel and Othniel New Names for Tunny and Clocky y n
display_title: Kushiel and Othniel New Names for Tunny and Clocky y n
wikitext:
[]: Kushiel and Othniel: New Names for Tunny and Clocky, y/n?             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Thu Oct 28, 2010 7:23 am *Could not fit yay an nay in the title* Anyway, it's been 15 months since Rebuild 2.0 has been out, so until Gainax gets off their butts and gives us names (if they're even kind enough to do that) I think it is safe to say we've out grown the temporary placeholder names of Tunniel and Clockiel. If anyone has any ideas for other angel names (as long as they're actual names) than go right ahead.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Oct 28, 2010 8:06 am This new name change would, too, be only temporary. Why change a temporary name to another temporary name? It would cause too much confusion with people already familiar with the current names, and it still wouldn't solve the problem. Tunniel and Clockiel is catchy too.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Thu Oct 28, 2010 9:37 am N.

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Thu Oct 28, 2010 10:27 am Ineffectual Plot Device 1 Ineffectual Plot Device 2

[]:             Quote Post by Taekmkm » Thu Oct 28, 2010 10:48 am We're getting the official names in November, calm down.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Thu Oct 28, 2010 10:54 am dunno but tunniel and clockiel sound awesome. don't tell me you wouldn't name your kids after them. tunniel, clockiel, dinner's ready! tunniel! stop hitting your sister!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Oct 28, 2010 11:12 am Taekmkm wrote: We're getting the official names in November, calm down.

[]:             Quote Post by Taekmkm » Thu Oct 28, 2010 11:14 am I'm talking about Super Robot Wars.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Oct 28, 2010 4:52 pm Taekmkm wrote: I'm talking about Super Robot Wars.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Thu Oct 28, 2010 7:39 pm ran1 wrote: Ineffectual Plot Device 1 Ineffectual Plot Device 2

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Oct 28, 2010 9:50 pm I'm with Sachi on this. Big fat N . It's probable that they'll announce the Angel names in 3.0 or 4.0, when they're all dead. And use the opportunity to get "Tabris" onscreen as well, which they didn't get around to in NGE. You can expect "new versions" of e.g. 1.0 and 2.0 Complete Works to be published: updated to include the Angel names, and maybe a couple of pages of new material as extra incentive for the most miserably obsessive fans. "Clockiel" and "Tunniel" are fine. If all the movies and accompanying supplemental material come out and there still aren't any names, then we can worry.

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Sat Oct 30, 2010 8:04 am Awe dang. :( Ineffectual Plot Device 1 Ineffectual Plot Device 2

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Oct 30, 2010 1:50 pm http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Plot_device

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Sat Oct 30, 2010 2:20 pm *Reads* So why does Ran1 want to call Kushiel and Othniel plot devices? They really don't seem like it.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Oct 30, 2010 2:25 pm Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion wrote: *Reads* So why does Ran1 want to call Kushiel and Othniel plot devices? They really don't seem like it.

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Sat Oct 30, 2010 3:25 pm Strange, it felt more like Mari was just there to introduce Kushiel and Asuka's appearance was just to introduce Othniel if you ask me.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Oct 30, 2010 3:36 pm Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion wrote: Strange, it felt more like Mari was just there to introduce Kushiel and Asuka's appearance was just to introduce Othniel if you ask me.

[]:             Quote Post by Nonoriri » Sat Oct 30, 2010 3:39 pm Yes clearly these throwaway angels are more important than the characters their insignificant deaths are used to introduce. Clearly.

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Sun Oct 31, 2010 7:39 am You best be trolling.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Oct 31, 2010 2:52 pm He's trolling, guys, disregard him.
